attributes.description: Overview of attacks detected by Contrast Security ADR

query.esql:
FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| STATS total_events = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| STATS total_events = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE event.outcome == "success"
| STATS exploited = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE event.outcome == "success"
| STATS exploited = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_apps = COUNT_DISTINCT(service.name)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_apps = COUNT_DISTINCT(service.name)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_ips = COUNT_DISTINCT(source.ip)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_ips = COUNT_DISTINCT(source.ip)

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE event.outcome IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY event.outcome
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE event.outcome IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY event.outcome
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY service.name
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY service.name
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE rule.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY rule.name
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE rule.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY rule.name
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE rule.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY rule.name, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE rule.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY rule.name, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE url.path IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY url.path
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| WHERE url.path IS NOT NULL
| STATS attack_count = COUNT(*) BY url.path
| SORT attack_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, source.ip, rule.name, event.outcome, service.name, url.path
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-contrast_security.attack_event-*
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, source.ip, rule.name, event.outcome, service.name, url.path
| LIMIT 20

attributes.title: [Contrast Security] Attack Summary Overview
